stemHtml: Whilst passing the altitude of 2000 ft during the climb, ATC clears the aircraft to climb to FL120. The altimeter setting shall…

options.a: Be set to 1013.2 hPa immediately, as long as the aircraft Is under ATC control.
options.b: Be set to 1013.2 hPa as soon as the flight is cleared to a flight level by ATC.
options.c: Remain on QNH until passing the transition level.
options.d: Remain on QNH until passing the transition altitude.
